summary: A Go-based monolithic testing framework featuring a schema validator, assertion runner, and MCP integration, currently cluttered by automated agent session artifacts.
concerns: High volume of auto-generated agent test directories (GOrchestra/glm-agents/*) polluting the repository structure
Session metadata commits cluttering git history
Potential test duplication between baseline and extra test files
suggestions: Clean up or .gitignore the GOrchestra/glm-agents ephemeral directories
Consolidate overlapping test suites to reduce maintenance burden
Implement git history filtering to remove automated session metadata commits
